_description: Reference: dynamic calendar block (W5.1). 3 layouts (month/week/agenda). Vanilla date-math (no Moment.js). Full ARIA grid + arrow-key keyboard navigation. Renders any collection of items with a date field as calendar entries.

props._a11y_note: Component renders ARIA-compliant grid (role=grid, role=row, role=gridcell). Arrow keys navigate days, Enter activates, Home/End jump week-start/end.
